macro.title: Will new tax on ultra-luxury NYC homes derail red-hot demand?
macro.what: The proposed tax would apply to second homes valued above $5 million, with higher rates for properties exceeding $15 million and $25 million.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Homebuilder confidence ticks down amid economic uncertainty
macro.what: Builder confidence fell four points to a reading of 34 in April, with 36% of builders cutting prices by 5% as mortgage rates remain high.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: From Nebraska to Alaska: Redfin and Glassdoor Rank the Top U.S. Cities For New Grads
macro.what: Chris Martin, a senior economist on Glassdoor’s economic research team, also provided data and analysis for this report
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

macro.title: Redfin Economists’ Weekly Take: Mortgage Rates Hold Steady, but Iran Ceasefire Talks Keep Risk of Sudden Swings on the Table
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: Mortgage rates have been steadier for the last few weeks
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Fed, Mortgage Rates Likely to Hold Steady on Latest Inflation Report
macro.what: Takeaway: Headline inflation, which includes food and energy prices, spiked in March, but rates won’t move much today because core inflation, which ignores those volatile components, remained subdued
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Waterstone Mortgage hires Jeremy Moreithi to lead Northern Virginia branch
housing.what: Waterstone Mortgage hires 20-year industry veteran Jeremy Moreithi to lead its Ashburn, Virginia, branch and serve surrounding areas.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: These are the cities where it pays to be a homeowner rather than a renter
housing.what: Homeownership was the more profitable choice in all 250 cities in the analysis when assuming a renter reinvested a potential down payment in stocks.
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: The Agency and Realty ONE Group opt into Tuccori settlement
housing.what: The Agency and Realty ONE Group opted into the Tuccori settlement and asked to stay the Cwynar case pending final approval.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: A Billionaire Beach Party: Mark Zuckerberg’s $170 Million Florida Purchase Tops March’s Most Expensive Home Sales
housing.what: A wave of ultra-luxury deals made coastal Florida the center of America’s priciest home sales in March
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Over One-Third of American Workers Are Delaying or Canceling Major Purchases Due to Job Security Concerns
housing.what: 7% of American workers are canceling plans to make a major purchase, such as buying a home or car, due to their feelings about job security, according to a Redfin survey
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Redfin Earns Top 10 Spot in RealTrends Verified Rankings, Powered by Agent Productivity
housing.what: Redfin has been recognized among the top residential real estate brokerages for the fourth year in a row! In 2025, our agents closed 50,484 transactions, totaling nearly $32 billion in sales – earning the #8 spot on the RealTrends Verified Brokerage Rankings by both sales volume and transaction count
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.
